articles.title: Rebel Wilson Triumphs In Explosive Court Battle With ‘The Deb’ Co-Star Charlotte MacInnes - Deadline
articles.description: Rebel Wilson did not defame Charlotte MacInnes, the Australian actress who stars in her directorial debut 'The Deb,' a Sydney court has ruled.
articles.content:

articles.author: Mark  Strassmann
articles.title: Australian woman gives birth to rare identical quadruplet daughters - CBS News
articles.description: All four daughters share 100 percent of their DNA after a single fertilized egg split into four embryos, making the pregnancy a one-in-15-million occurrence.
articles.content:
Jenitar Na'amoana and her husband, Jortham, thought their family was complete after welcoming four children. Then came an unexpected surprise: four naturally conceived, identical daughters.
